programme.desc: With a temper that's always on the verge of boiling over, a young man's life is transformed in an instant when he meets a woman who brings out the best in him.

programme.title: Antony Firingee
programme.desc: Antony Firingee, of Portuguese descent, pursues his dream of becoming a celebrated Bengali folk poet. However, his ardent love for a courtesan named Shakila ultimately leads him to a tragic demise.

programme.title: Shapath Nilam
programme.desc: Sukanta is shattered when his wife, Minu, is raped on their honeymoon. Though his wife fails to recognise him after the incident, her twin sister, Debu, tries to find the culprit.

programme.title: Antardhaan
programme.desc: Anirban, a professor, is transferred to a new town. However, chaos ensues when his daughter, Zinia, mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1474 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.desc: Follow the life of Moosa, a fisherman who lives with his wife and two children and faces a lot of exciting and comedic paradoxes in his day-to-day life with family & work.

programme.title: Madaari
programme.desc: Nirmal, a man who lost his son due to the negligence of the government, seeks revenge and kidnaps the ten-year-old son of the home minister, forcing the administration to meet his demands.

programme.title: Krrish
programme.desc: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveal his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

programme.title: Hungama
programme.desc: A millionaire businessman living in a village decides to move to the city with his wife. However, things take a comical turn as a case of mistaken identity causes chaos in their lives.

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: When her disabled daughter is kidnapped, Vidya attempts to save her, but a car knocks her off. When the police get involved in the case, Vidya's mysterious past is revealed.

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Ramkishan and Mamta lead a happy life with their three sons. But when their daughter faces a tragedy, Mamta gets instigated by her close friends, and she embitters her heart towards her stepson Vivek.

programme.title: The Big Bull
programme.desc: Hemant Shah, a sharp-witted stockbroker, manipulates the system and goes from rags to riches in no time. Before long, journalist Meera starts digging into his activities.

programme.title: Son of Sardaar
programme.desc: Jaswinder returns to his hometown to sell a piece of land he owns and falls in love with a young woman only to find out later that her family wants him dead.

programme.title: Stree2 - Sarkate Ka Aatank
programme.desc: In the town of Chanderi, a headless spirit begins to abduct women. Vicky and his friends unite to resolve the mystery and save everyone from the threat.

programme.title: No One Killed Jessica
programme.desc: Sabrina Lal joins forces with Meera, an investigative journalist, to seek justice for her sister Jessica, who was murdered by the son of an influential politician.

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: The relationship between two stepbrothers develops cracks when they fall in love with the same woman. As a result, the younger brother tries to kill the other and inherit the insurance money.
